aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and a reasonable amount of service-related content. However, it lacks customer reviews, detailed content, and local optimization.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews to the website and encourage reviews on Google.
Expand service pages with detailed content and relevant keywords.
Optimize meta tags and headers with location-specific keywords.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and complete information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not fully optimized. It has no reviews, which significantly impacts local search visibility. The profile needs more detailed information and regular updates.
critical_issues: Lack of regular updates or posts on the GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on its website, but it needs more citations on local directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major local directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms.
Encourage local publications and industry directories to include the business citation.

schema_gaps: No LocalBusiness sub-type schema with detailed business hours and service area

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and detailed content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers looking for reviews and detailed service information
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding customer reviews and expanding service pages with relevant keywords
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing blog posts, case studies, and engaging with the community through local events and partnerships

page_title: Affordable AC Repair and AC Installation in Fort Worth, TX
